overall.description: First-person exploration of the Slytherin common room from Hogwarts Legacy, showcasing Gothic stone architecture with vaulted ceilings, a decorated Christmas tree, warm fireplace lighting, and house banners. The player ascends from a corridor into the main hall, enters a side lounge, and returns to the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic stone corridor with arched ceiling and stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking up a stone staircase through a narrow Gothic corridor with stained glass windows

entered.detail: large stone archway with pointed Gothic design at the end of the corridor
green-tinted stained glass window with Gothic tracery
green-tinted stained glass window with Gothic tracery
ornate wall-mounted lantern with warm yellow light

decorative iron railing with intricate scrollwork along the staircase
decorative iron railing with intricate scrollwork along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow Gothic stone corridor with green stained glass windows and warm wall lanterns. The camera ascends a wide stone staircase with ornate metal railings, moving toward a large archway at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: Main common room hall with high vaulted ceiling and stone columns

events.description: exits the narrow corridor and enters the large main common room with vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking through the main hall, observing the architecture and moving toward a large statue and staircase

entered.detail: high ribbed Gothic ceiling with stone vaulting
tall cylindrical stone pillar supporting the ceiling
tall cylindrical stone pillar supporting the ceiling
large stone fireplace with burning fire
elegant curved stone staircase with decorative railings
tall stone statue of a robed figure at the top of the stairs
ornate standing candelabra with multiple lit candles
dark wooden door with glass panels and metal scrollwork

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a grand hall with a high vaulted Gothic ceiling supported by massive stone columns. The space features a curved staircase on the left, a burning fireplace on the right, and a large robed statue at the far end. The camera moves steadily through the hall toward a wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: Cozy lounge area with Christmas tree and lit fireplace

events.description: opens wooden door and enters the side lounge room with Christmas tree
approaches the fireplace, warm firelight becomes dominant illumination

agents.ego_description: entering the lounge, walking around the Christmas tree, and approaching the fireplace to examine the Slytherin banner

entered.detail: tall decorated Christmas tree with candles and ornaments in the center of the room
wooden four-poster bed with green drapery
wooden four-poster bed with green drapery
brown leather tufted armchair near the fireplace
large stone fireplace with burning logs and warm glow
green and silver checkered banner hanging above the fireplace mantel
large circular patterned rug on the stone floor
stacked wooden trunks and luggage near the bed

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a cozy lounge through a wooden door, revealing a large decorated Christmas tree and comfortable furnishings. The space features green-draped four-poster beds, leather armchairs, and a prominent stone fireplace with a Slytherin banner hanging above it. The camera approaches the fireplace, bathed in warm firelight, and examines the banner before looking around the room.

events.description: exits the lounge room and returns to the main hall entrance area

agents.ego_description: leaving the lounge room and returning to the main staircase, looking down the stairs toward the exit

entered.detail: grand stone staircase viewed from above, leading down to the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the lounge through the wooden door, returning to the main hall. The view shifts to look down the grand stone staircase from above, with ornate railings visible on both sides, completing the circular path through the common room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow Gothic corridor into the expansive, warm interiors of the Slytherin common room before returning to the entrance. It begins by ascending a wide stone staircase past green stained glass and wall lanterns, moving steadily toward a large archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the space opens into a grand hall with high vaulted ceilings and massive stone columns, leading past a burning fireplace and a robed statue toward a wooden door. The scene then shifts into a cozy lounge filled with leather armchairs and a decorated Christmas tree, where the camera approaches a stone fireplace and a hanging house banner bathed in warm firelight. Finally, the camera exits the lounge and returns to the main hall, turning to look down the ornate stone staircase to complete the circular path.
